prompt: A cinematic third-person action RPG gameplay screenshot set in Macau Peninsula, New Road, styled like a gritty realistic open-world crime game from the late 1990s. The camera is positioned behind a lone male protagonist standing in the middle of a rain-soaked street, full body visible from the back, wearing a dark brown leather jacket with a large embroidered dragon on the back, blue jeans, and dark shoes. He faces a dense neon-lit urban street packed with pedestrians, old shopfronts, hanging signs, tangled cables, weathered apartment buildings, and a tram approaching from the center distance. The scene is at dusk under a cloudy sky, with wet asphalt reflecting orange, pink, blue, and white neon signage. The environment should evoke old Macau with a Cantonese-Portuguese visual mix: narrow streets, vintage cars, crowded sidewalks, multilingual storefront signs, one large glowing sign reading GRAND LISBOA, another reading BANCO TAI SIN, and many vertical Chinese neon signs layered into the depth of the street. Include 1 tram in the middle lane, 1 black sedan parked on the left, and around 10 to 14 pedestrians crossing or standing on both sides of the road. Add realistic puddles, crosswalk lines, metal railings in the right foreground, storefront interiors with warm lighting on the left, and a moody noir atmosphere. Overlay a complete game HUD: top left circular character portrait with the name 龍少爺, level 36, 3 horizontal status bars; top center compass with N and E markers plus the location text and a clock reading 14:35; top right circular minimap with icons; right side quest tracker panel containing 3 quest groups with Chinese text, with the top highlighted quest header in orange; bottom left semi-transparent chat box with 4 colored lines of Chinese system and world chat plus a text entry bar and a send button; bottom center hotbar with 7 skill slots labeled 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, Q, E, R, including a large ornate circular ultimate icon at the center and one glowing purple skill icon; bottom right 5 menu icons with Chinese labels for character, inventory, quests, friends, and settings, plus a small ESC indicator. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic rendering, dramatic reflections, dense environmental storytelling, realistic crowd scale, high-end PC game UI, muted cinematic color grading with neon highlights.
